title: Hello World
content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.
Quick StartCreate a new post$ hexo new "My New Post"

More info: Writing
Run server$ hexo server

More info: Server
Generate static files$ hexo generate

More info: Generating
Deploy to remote sites$ hexo deploy

More info: Deployment

  alert("Hello World"); 

# 安全设置encrypt:# 启用插件enable: false# 自定义加密相关设置abstract: “这里的内容加密了，需要密码哦。”message: “请输入密码查看本文。”# 可以在这里设定特定标签对应的默认密码tags:- [name: “encryptAsSecret”, password: “yoursecret”]# 错误消息设置wrong_pass_message: “密码错误，请重试。”wrong_hash_message: “内容认证失败，但仍可尝试查看。”# 是否禁用日志记录silent: false

title: misc的各种编码
content:
emoji编码在线网站解密https://aghorler.github.io/emoji-aes/
key一般在文件名中或其他地方
e.g.[SWPUCTF 2023 秋季新生赛]谁发的图片打不开啊
